note: 0n1x anchors a root over its live signed ledgers to BITCOIN via OpenTimestamps (free, no wallet) on a schedule. This makes the AGE of the ledger unforgeable — a fast-follower can copy the code but not the Bitcoin-anchored continuous history. Verify: the .ots proofs in _ots_proofs/ upgrade to a Bitcoin block header; recompute the root from the ledgers and check.
